paper.title_en: Quantum graviton scattering with definite helicities in the null surface formulation
paper.abstract_en: We develop a helicity-resolved description of quantum graviton scattering in the Null Surface Formulation (NSF) of gravity. Dynamical data are Bondi shear modes at null infinity ($\mathscr{I}$), and the metric is reconstructed from the cut function. Matching between $\mathscr{I}^+$ and $\mathscr{I}^-$ yields $Z_{\text{total}} = Z_{\text{cut}} + Z_{\text{cone}}$, where $Z_{\text{cut}}$ contains free shear data and $Z_{\text{cone}}$ is the nonlinear cone source solution--analogous to the scalar retarded-advanced relation with on-shell free-data differences. Using second-order NSF equations for $Z_2$ and $Ω_2$, we derive the second-order Bondi shear and outgoing operators $δa_{2,\pm}^{\text{out}}$. Written via on-shell phase-space data at $\mathscr{I}$, their kernels contain spin-weighted angular Green functions and 3D momentum constraints, with energy fixed by positive frequency. The quadratic cone source decomposes into normal-ordered sectors, allowing matrix elements to select distinct operator components. We obtain the $(2 \to 1)$ tail amplitude and $(2 \to 2)$ four-graviton matrix elements. The tail amplitude is generated by the two-annihilation sector, selecting helicities via the NSF kernels' spin-weight structure. For four-point scattering, products of two outgoing operators reconstruct spatial momentum conservation; 4D conservation is recovered by imposing the positive-energy on-shell Poincaré sector. This reproduces standard tree-level amplitudes, with Mandelstam poles arising from angular Green functions and helicity projections. This yields an intrinsically on-shell formulation of graviton scattering without off-shell bulk propagators, with celestial sphere spectral-angular distributions as natural observables.

decision.selection_reason_zh: 该论文在零曲面表述下发展了一种新颖的具有螺旋度分辨的量子引力子散射框架，理论深度高，方法严谨，属于广义相对论基础方向的前沿工作。
decision.title_zh: 零曲面表述中具有确定螺旋度的量子引力子散射
decision.abstract_zh: 我们在引力的零曲面表述（NSF）中发展了具有螺旋度分辨的量子引力子散射描述。动力学数据是无穷远零面（$\mathscr{I}$）上的Bondi剪切模，度规由cut函数重构。$\mathscr{I}^+$和$\mathscr{I}^-$之间的匹配给出$Z_{\text{total}} = Z_{\text{cut}} + Z_{\text{cone}}$，其中$Z_{\text{cut}}$包含自由剪切数据，$Z_{\text{cone}}$是非线性锥源解——类似于标量推迟-超前关系，其中包含壳上自由数据差。利用$Z_2$和$Ω_2$的二阶NSF方程，我们推导了二阶Bondi剪切和出射算符$δa_{2,\pm}^{\text{out}}$。通过$\mathscr{I}$处的壳上相空间数据写出，它们的核包含自旋权重角格林函数和三维动量约束，其中能量由正频率固定。二次锥源分解为正规有序的扇区，使得矩阵元能够选择不同的算符分量。我们得到了$(2 \to 1)$尾振幅和$(2 \to 2)$四引力子矩阵元。尾振幅由双湮灭扇区产生，通过NSF核的自旋权重结构选择螺旋度。对于四点散射，两个出射算符的乘积重构了空间动量守恒；通过施加正能量壳上Poincaré扇区恢复了四维守恒。这再现了标准树图振幅，其中Mandelstam极点来自角格林函数和螺旋度投影。这给出了一个本质上的壳上引力子散射表述，无需离壳体传播子，天球谱角分布作为自然可观测量。
